# Elevate Records — Cafe De Anatolia Showcase

## About
Cafe De Anatolia Showcase este un eveniment de muzica Organic & Melodic House organizat de Elevate Records pe 25 Aprilie 2026 la Grand Hotel Bucharest, Romania. Este prima data cand conceptul Cafe De Anatolia ajunge in Romania.

## Event Details
- Date: 25 Aprilie 2026, 22:00-04:00
- Venue: Grand Hotel Bucharest, Bulevardul Nicolae Balcescu 4, Bucuresti
- Artists: Rialians On Earth, Billy Esteban, Keto van Harum, Jasmine
- Tickets: 100 RON (First Wave, limitat la 300 bilete) via biletin.ro
- Capacity: 1200
- Genre: Organic House, Melodic House, Ethnic House

## About Cafe De Anatolia
Cafe De Anatolia este un label muzical fondat de familia Ilievi, recunoscut de Forbes si Entrepreneur ca pionier al genului Organic House. Are peste 4 milioane de abonati pe YouTube si a organizat evenimente in Tulum, Mykonos, Dubai si festivaluri din intreaga lume. Colaboreaza cu Sony Music Publishing.

## Links
- Website: https://elevaterecords.ro
- Tickets: https://biletin.ro/bilete/cafe-de-anatolia-showcase-1
- Cafe De Anatolia: https://cafe-de-anatolia.com
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/elevaterecords.ro
- Instagram Cafe De Anatolia: https://instagram.com/cafedeanatolia
